title: Don't Miss the Boom: 3 Meme Stocks Set to Explode Higher
text: Despite their controversial nature, meme stocks offer great potential for investors willing to gamble. The rise of meme stocks in the past has been a mix of ideology against hedge funds to more commonly, simply retail traders riding a wave of hype and FOMO, or the fear of missing out.

title: The 3 Best Wind Stocks to Buy Now: September 2023
text: With the goal of reducing fossil fuels and achieving a cleaner climate, many nations have committed themselves to net zero status. The term refers to the balance between the amount of greenhouse gas (GHG) that's produced and the amount that's removed from the atmosphere.

title: Meta Stock Leads 5 Names Showing Resilience In Market Downturn

title: US regulator orders planes be inspected for unauthorised parts
text: US regulators have told airlines to inspect planes and inventories for parts allegedly sold under counterfeit paperwork by a UK supplier. Following allegations by CFM International that AOG Technics sold parts for its engines under forged approval paperwork, the Federal Aviation Administration issued an alert on Thursday.

title: iQGeo bags another contract as telco switches from GE
text: IQGeo ticked higher as it announced a “major new contract” with an existing US and European telecoms customer described as one of the world's top five wholesale fibre network providers with operations in the US and Europe. The contract has a total value of US1.9 million over three years including software of US$400,000 per annum with the customer replacing its incumbent fibre system of record, currently provided by GE, with IQGeo's Network Manager Telecom software.

title: GE Board of Directors Authorizes Regular Quarterly Dividend
text: BOSTON--(BUSINESS WIRE)--The Board of Directors of GE (NYSE: GE) today declared a $0.08 per share dividend on the outstanding common stock of the Company. The dividend is payable October 25, 2023, to shareholders of record at the close of business on September 26, 2023. The ex-dividend date is September 25, 2023. text: The White House expects to see meaningful progress on GE jet engines and civil nuclear technology in upcoming bilateral talks between U.S. President Joe Biden and India Prime Minister Narendra Modi, national security adviser Jake Sullivan told reporters on Thursday.

title: GE Aerospace selected by Bell for V-280 Valor Future Long-Range Assault Aircraft

title: Attention C-Suite: New GE Study Finds Divergent Views on Leadership Development
text: BOSTON--(BUSINESS WIRE)--As companies and employees alike adapt to a changing work environment beset by return-to-work debates, AI fears and other challenges, a new nationwide study by GE (NYSE:GE) and global polling firm Ipsos found agreement in the need for companies to clearly articulate their approach to leadership, but divergent views between C-suite and entry-level respondents as to how successfully companies are delivering. “From the Ground Floor to the Corner Office” surveyed over 250 C.
